summary: Roadmap active.v1.json has stale status for CI-004, CI-006, PG-002 — tools exist but marked not_started
details: CI-004 (5 roadmap tools) and CI-006 (session diff) are fully implemented and registered but marked 'not_started' at 0%. PG-002 is partially implemented (runner exists, startup wiring missing) but marked 'not_started'. This causes roadmap_next to recommend items that are actually done, wasting agent time. Fix: update status fields to reflect actual completion.
